    "Heavy equipment backing up near an open trench without a designated spotter",
    "Imminent risk of equipment tip-over, trench cave-in, or striking workers"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order an immediate stop to the backing operation",
    "Establish a dedicated spotter and clear safety perimeter before resuming work",
    "Conduct a safety stand-down to review backing procedures and trench safety zones"

  "rationale": "Operating heavy equipment in reverse near an open excavation without a spotter violates OSHA safety standards and poses an immediate, critical hazard to the operator and ground workers.",
